renderedFields.description:
When a PDF template's status changes to Approved for the first time, stamp an
approval-timestamp field on related records that haven't been stamped yet.
Record-triggered Flow handles the trigger + decision; invocable Apex does the
bulk update across related records (not easy declaratively).

AC:

  • Invocable @InvocableMethod on a helper Apex class
  • Record-triggered Flow on the PDF template object, fires on status → Approved
  • Test class for the Apex, ≥75% coverage
  • Docs updated

fields.summary: When PDF template hits Approved, timestamp related records via Flow + invocable Apex

issuetype.description: A user story. Created by JIRA Software - do not edit or delete.
issuetype.name: Story
